// {{.Kind}} Authentication Middleware Configuration
// Generated by TRex framework - provides both JWT and Bearer token authentication options

package {{.KindLowerPlural}}

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"

	"{{.Library}}/pkg/auth"
	"{{.Library}}/pkg/config"
	"{{.Library}}/pkg/environments"
	"google.golang.org/grpc"
)

// Configure{{.Kind}}Authentication sets up authentication middleware for the {{.Kind}} service
// This function demonstrates how to use the TRex authentication framework
func Configure{{.Kind}}Authentication(env *environments.Env) (func(http.Handler) http.Handler, grpc.UnaryServerInterceptor, grpc.StreamServerInterceptor) {
	authConfig := env.Config.Auth
	
	// HTTP Middleware
	var httpMiddleware func(http.Handler) http.Handler
	
	// gRPC Interceptors  
	var unaryInterceptor grpc.UnaryServerInterceptor
	var streamInterceptor grpc.StreamServerInterceptor
	
	if authConfig.EnableBearer {
		// Use Bearer Token Authentication
		token := authConfig.BearerToken
		if token == "" {
			// Fallback to service-specific environment variable
			token = os.Getenv("{{.KindUpper}}_API_TOKEN")
		}
		
		if token != "" {
			// HTTP Bearer Token Middleware
			httpMiddleware = auth.BearerTokenMiddleware(
				token,
				authConfig.BypassPaths,
			)
			
			// gRPC Bearer Token Interceptors
			unaryInterceptor = auth.BearerTokenUnaryInterceptor(
				token,
				authConfig.BypassMethods,
			)
			streamInterceptor = auth.BearerTokenStreamInterceptor(
				token,
				authConfig.BypassMethods,
			)
		}
	} else if authConfig.EnableJWT {
		// Use existing JWT Authentication (fallback to current behavior)
		httpMiddleware = env.AuthMiddleware.AuthenticateAccountJWT
		
		// For gRPC JWT, use the existing AuthUnaryInterceptor from the server
		// This is handled by the gRPC server setup, not per-service
		unaryInterceptor = nil
		streamInterceptor = nil
	}
	
	return httpMiddleware, unaryInterceptor, streamInterceptor
}

// Example usage in plugin.go init() function:
//
// func init() {
//     // ... existing registrations ...
//     
//     // Register authentication configuration
//     httpAuth, unaryAuth, streamAuth := Configure{{.Kind}}Authentication(env())
//     
//     // Use in route registration
//     pkgserver.RegisterRoutes("{{.KindLowerPlural}}", func(apiV1Router *mux.Router, services pkgserver.ServicesInterface, authMiddleware auth.JWTMiddleware, authzMiddleware auth.AuthorizationMiddleware) {
//         if httpAuth != nil {
//             // Use bearer token auth instead of JWT
//             apiV1Router.Use(httpAuth)
//         } else {
//             // Fallback to JWT auth
//             apiV1Router.Use(authMiddleware.AuthenticateAccountJWT)
//         }
//         
//         // ... register routes ...
//     })
//     
//     // Use in gRPC registration
//     pkgserver.RegisterGRPCService("{{.KindLowerPlural}}", func(grpcServer *grpc.Server, services pkgserver.ServicesInterface) {
//         if unaryAuth != nil && streamAuth != nil {
//             // Register bearer token interceptors
//             pkgserver.RegisterPreAuthGRPCUnaryInterceptor(unaryAuth)
//             pkgserver.RegisterPreAuthGRPCStreamInterceptor(streamAuth)
//         }
//         
//         // ... register gRPC service ...
//     })
// }
